'''Terana''' was an [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid belt]] that was located in the [[Vernet system/Legends|Vernet system]], within the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

*{{JournalCite|15|The Draw}}
